ham: Dear patient, this is a reminder that your appointment with Dr. Sharma is scheduled on 15th April 2026 at 10:00 AM. Please arrive 10 minutes early. Reply YES to confirm or NO to reschedule.
spam: Hey! Quick heads up: We have a hot remote job offer on WhatsApp! Earn ₹5000 a day from home. No experience needed. Secure your spot now! <URL> Reply NOW!
